evals.prompt: Write a Playwright test to detect IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) vulnerabilities where user A should not access user B's data
expected_patterns: /api/orders OR /api/users OR similar resource ID parameter
anti_patterns: expect success status for cross-user access

evals.prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that fails the build on high-severity dependency vulnerabilities (npm audit or OSV-Scanner)
expected_patterns: npm audit OR npm ci OR osv-scanner
name: npm audit OR dependency-check OR osv-scan
anti_patterns: npm install instead of npm ci
continue-on-error: true with no exit 1 gate

evals.prompt: Write a Playwright test that validates secure cookie flags (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite) on a login response
Write a test that validates CSRF protection by rejecting POST requests without a valid CSRF token
expected_patterns: Deliberately omitting CSRF token OR no csrf-token header
anti_patterns: token hardcoded instead of extracted from response

evals.prompt: Write a test that checks for XSS vulnerabilities by verifying user input is escaped in stored content
anti_patterns: storing raw HTML from user input

evals.prompt: Write a test to detect SQL injection vulnerabilities with payloads like ' OR '1'='1 and verify error handling doesn't leak internals
expected_patterns: DROP TABLE OR UNION SELECT OR OR '1'='1
anti_patterns: error response contains database name or schema

evals.prompt: Write a test to verify SSRF (Server-Side Request Forgery) prevention by testing internal network payloads like 169.254.169.254 and localhost:6379
expected_patterns: 169.254.169.254 OR metadata.google.internal OR localhost:6379 OR file:///

evals.prompt: Configure SAST for a TypeScript repo to detect unsafe patterns (eval, object injection, unsafe regex), and explain what the real SAST gate should be
anti_patterns: .eslintrc.js as the recommended config for a new project

evals.prompt: Write a test to validate that JWT tokens with the none algorithm or expired tokens are rejected
Write a test that verifies session invalidation on logout and that old session cookies are rejected
expected_patterns: Attempt to use old session OR Cookie: sessionCookie
anti_patterns: old session still works after logout
no verification that session cookie is cleared
login not called before logout test

evals.prompt: Write a Playwright test that asserts the response carries HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, and X-Frame-Options security headers
Write a test that verifies rate limiting on the login endpoint: fire 15 concurrent login attempts and expect a 429 response (OWASP A06 insecure design)
Configure a GitHub Actions supply-chain job that generates an SBOM and produces a signed build provenance attestation (OWASP A03)
anti_patterns: npm install instead of npm ci
only npm audit with no supply-chain provenance
